source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An emergency drain pump should be able to pump 0.1 m^3/s liquid water at 15\circ\text{C}, 10 m vertically up, delivering it with a velocity of 20 m/s. It is estimated that the pump, pipe, and nozzle have a combined isentropic efficiency expressed for the pump as 60%. How much power is needed to drive the pump?
